pi_items.source: Calculated by reading the memo generated in setup_task.sh and converting hours to days based on an 8-hour workday (e.g., EMP012 Annual Leave: 80 hours / 8 = 10 days).
Read from the memo generated in setup_task.sh, which states 'Employee: Sarah Jenkins (EMP013) Status: PROBATION EXTENDED - Action: Do NOT allocate any leave at this time.'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires reading a synthetically generated leave allocation memo and correctly computing and entering the resulting days of leave for 4 employees based on an 8-hour workday. I verified that EMP012 is allocated 10 days of Annual Leave and 5 days of Sick Leave, EMP017 is allocated 8 days Annual Leave and 4 days Sick Leave, and EMP019 is allocated 12 days Annual Leave and 6 days Sick Leave. EMP013 has an extended probation and should not receive any leave allocations.
